args.query:
SELECT p.System, p.Name, p.Version, p.Licenses, p.Links, p.Advisories, p.VersionInfo, p.Hashes, p.DependenciesProcessed, p.DependencyError, p.UpstreamPublishedAt, p.Registries, p.SLSAProvenance, p.UpstreamIdentifiers, p.Purl
FROM packageinfo p
JOIN (
  SELECT Name, MAX(UpstreamPublishedAt) AS maxpub
  FROM packageinfo
  WHERE System='NPM' AND UpstreamPublishedAt IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY Name
) m ON p.Name = m.Name AND p.UpstreamPublishedAt = m.maxpub
WHERE p.System='NPM';

exec_args.sql:
SELECT p.System, p.Name, p.Version, p.Licenses, p.Links, p.Advisories, p.VersionInfo, p.Hashes, p.DependenciesProcessed, p.DependencyError, p.UpstreamPublishedAt, p.Registries, p.SLSAProvenance, p.UpstreamIdentifiers, p.Purl
FROM packageinfo p
JOIN (
  SELECT Name, MAX(UpstreamPublishedAt) AS maxpub
  FROM packageinfo
  WHERE System='NPM' AND UpstreamPublishedAt IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY Name
) m ON p.Name = m.Name AND p.UpstreamPublishedAt = m.maxpub
WHERE p.System='NPM';
